text: The gnomes are hard at work. Between promo materials, artwork, and final line edits, the book release is later than expected. Full launch on July 10th 💪
Advance Reader Copies are now being formatted. *No Snooze Button for the Wicked* is scheduled to release in 2 weeks - stay tuned!
